description:
attached_molecule: to-wisp-smrw
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-29T05:24:55Z
dispatched_by: mayor

## Issue

E2E tests are failing due to a Cloudflare Workers compatibility issue with async_hooks.

### Error

could not resolve async_hooks
.svelte-kit/output/server/entries/hooks.server.js:4:47:
  const { AsyncLocalStorage } = await import(async_hooks);

The package async_hooks wasn't found on the file system but is built into node.
- Add the nodejs_compat compatibility flag to your project.

### Impact

E2E tests cannot run, blocking CI/CD pipeline.

### Affected Commands

- npm run test
- npm run test:e2e
- playwright test

### Reproduction

1. Checkout main branch
2. Run: npm run test:e2e
3. Observe build failure

### Notes

This is a pre-existing issue not caused by recent changes. Affects refinery merge processing.
title: E2E tests failing: async_hooks compatibility issue

Replace the placeholder src/routes/+page.svelte with the actual voting UI. Load two random dishes from D1 in the +page.server.ts load function. Show them side-by-side using DishCard from src/lib/components/DishCard.svelte. When user clicks a card, POST to /api/vote with {winnerId, loserId}, show loading state on both cards, then load a fresh pair. Add a subtle 'vs' divider between the cards. The dishes table will have an elo column (done by to-cqu). Integration branch: integration/tot-app.
title: Build home page: two random dishes head-to-head voting UI

description:
attached_molecule: to-wisp-tmf1
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-29T05:22:27Z
dispatched_by: mayor

The dishes table is missing an elo column. Add it (default 1200) to schema.ts and seed.sql. Then create src/routes/api/vote/+server.ts: POST takes {winnerId, loserId}, validates both dishes exist, records two vote rows (winner value=1, loser value=-1), calls processVote() from src/lib/elo.ts to compute new ratings, updates both dishes.elo in D1, returns {winnerId, loserID, winnerElo, loserElo}. Use Drizzle ORM (already wired via wrangler D1 binding). Integration branch: integration/tot-app.
title: Add elo column to dishes table and build POST /api/vote endpoint

svelte-check reports: Cannot find name 'D1Database' in src/lib/server/db/index.ts. This is a pre-existing issue on main — Cloudflare Workers types need to be generated via 'pnpm run gen' (wrangler types). Run that command and commit the generated .d.ts file to fix.
title: Pre-existing: svelte-check fails - D1Database type not found in src/lib/server/db/index.ts
